question: Q-b21-learned-router-interference-control
conjecture: A single shared, capacity-bounded, A/B-equivariant router can learn when to execute field A, field B, or conservatively ABSTAIN to MERGED. It must preserve B2's cross-field benefit, restore in-field performance, beat always-MERGED overall on both 2Wiki and MuSiQue, survive field partitions and top-k variation, and fail closed under shuffled targets.

already_public_before_registration.note: Only the frozen B2 aggregate, input counts, schema hazards, and split sizes were inspected. No B2.1 arm outputs, learned-router metrics, shuffled-control outcomes, private-entity outcomes, or benchmark conclusion were computed or inspected before this registration.

per_cell_joint_gates.cross_router_minus_best_single: delta > +0.02 and gold-component cluster-bootstrap 95% lower bound > 0
per_cell_joint_gates.nontrivial_acceptance: at least one executed A or B action on the fixed test split

controls.best_single: gold oracle for evaluation only; never an executable fallback
controls.shuffled_target: capacity-matched router in every one of the 54 standard cells; any joint pass forces REJECTED_CONTROL_FAILURE
controls.private_entity_surface: opaque entity replacement preserving equality and topology; tests entity-surface dependence only and is not an answer mask
controls.exact_frozen_b2_reproduction: all 400 queries x 4 arm ranked ID lists and scores must match the unmodified B2 scorer at tolerance 1e-9, and published B2 aggregates must match

matrix.standard_cells: 2 datasets x 3 partition salts x 3 top-k values x 3 split seeds = 54
matrix.private_entity_cells: 2 datasets x legacy salt x top-k 10 x 3 split seeds = 6

conclusion_rules_in_priority_order: REJECTED_CONTROL_FAILURE: one or more shuffled-target cells jointly passes
SUPPORTED_GENERAL: both primary dataset cells pass, at least 44/54 standard cells pass, no shuffled cell passes, and both primary private-entity cells jointly pass
SUPPORTED_NARROW: both primary dataset cells pass, at least 27/54 standard cells pass, no shuffled cell passes, and private-entity primary deltas versus MERGED are each >= -0.02
SURFACE_DEPENDENT: both primary dataset cells pass, at least 27/54 standard cells pass, and private-entity no-harm fails

DOMAIN_CONDITIONAL: exactly one dataset has a passing primary cell, at least 50% passing cells within that dataset, zero shuffled passes within that dataset, and private-entity no-harm for that dataset
kill_conditions: Any preregistered artifact hash mismatch, missing prediction receipt, or non-exact frozen B2 reproduction voids measurement before router evaluation.
Any shuffled-target joint pass forces REJECTED_CONTROL_FAILURE regardless of favorable primary or robustness outcomes.
Failure on both primary dataset cells rejects the shared cross-domain router claim.
The private control cannot support a direct-answer-edge deletion claim because this graph has no typed direct-answer edge.

scope_boundary.frozen_state: MiniLM embeddings, B2 semantic edge weights, A/B topology, seam construction, scoring formula, candidate budget, and test cohorts
scope_boundary.allowed_claim: learned conservative routing among existing A, B, and MERGED HSWM readouts
disallowed_claims: general hard-hop superiority beyond the two frozen datasets

pre_measurement_certificate.expected_reason: No result or scripted judgment exists before execution; reproducibility lineage is also not yet available.

user_canon_seed: USER 2026-07-23: multiple SOLID HSWM maps should connect, separate, and specialize MoE-style without a fixed first layer; the agent completes the semantic neural network by learning HSWM weight adjustment.
